findings.title: CI pass rate 20% — Xvfb/mypy/timeout failures
findings.evidence: gh run list: 16 failures, 3 successes, 1 skipped in last 20 runs
findings.remediation: Pin actions/checkout@v4, add Xvfb guard, 10-min timeout, consolidate Jules workflows

findings.title: backend/server.py is 6721-line god object
findings.remediation: Extract into routes/, services/, models/ packages

findings.title: 47 TODO/FIXME comments without issue links
findings.remediation: Convert each to issue or remove stale ones

findings.title: Monolithic src/ with only 5 Python files for 320K LOC
findings.evidence: src/ contains __init__.py, contracts.py, ml_projects.py plus notebooks
findings.remediation: Reorganize into models/, data/, training/, evaluation/, deployment/ packages

findings.title: Test-to-source ratio 0.05 (target 0.50)
findings.remediation: Add unit tests for all public functions; introduce property-based tests

findings.title: Bare except blocks in notebook code
findings.evidence: Notebooks contain bare except: that swallow exceptions silently
findings.remediation: Replace with explicit exception types; log failures

findings.title: 200+ TODO comments without issue links; single-author risk
findings.evidence: git shortlog -sn --since=6months shows one dominant author >90%
findings.remediation: Cross-train; pair programming; convert TODOs to issues

findings.title: No AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md
findings.evidence: Agent cannot determine how to run training jobs
findings.remediation: Create AGENTS.md with env setup, training commands, data paths

findings.title: Jules-dominated CI with ephemeral machine-generated branch names
findings.evidence: Branch jules-5025444499394185959-6528b1d7 is hard to trace
findings.remediation: Adopt semantic branch naming (fix/, feat/, refactor/); clean stale Jules branches

findings.title: CI failures on mypy errors — known lingering issue
findings.evidence: Branch name fix/issue-3048-api-mypy-errors indicates known issue
findings.remediation: Fix mypy errors before merge; add mypy to pre-commit

findings.title: Mypy exclusion list disables type checking for ~30% of codebase
findings.evidence: pyproject.toml mypy exclusions cover config/project_template/, data_processing/, media_processing/
findings.remediation: Remove exclusions incrementally; fix typing in one module per sprint

findings.title: Jules automation workflows create CI noise
findings.evidence: Mixed pass/fail pattern in recent runs
findings.remediation: Separate human-triggered CI from bot CI; use workflow_run dependencies

findings.title: CI failures on shared mypy autofix branch — stale fix branch
findings.remediation: Complete mypy fixes; merge or abandon; do not leave fix branches open >30 days

findings.title: Test collection shows 5 errors (1629 tests, 5 collection errors)
findings.remediation: Fix import errors; add pytest --co to CI as a gate

findings.title: God modules exist — refactor branch indicates oversized files
findings.remediation: Complete refactor; enforce 500-line file cap in CI via wc -l check

findings.title: 80+ TODO/FIXME comments; stale refactor branch
findings.remediation: Complete or abandon refactor; convert TODOs to issues

findings.title: CI failures frequent — recent runs show red
findings.remediation: Triage failing tests; pin action versions; add flaky-test retry logic

findings.title: 547 commits in 30 days — extreme churn; single-author risk
findings.evidence: git shortlog -sn --since=30days shows one dominant author
findings.remediation: Code review enforcement; distribute knowledge via pair programming

findings.title: Mixed CI health with 42 workflow files
findings.remediation: Consolidate workflows; delete obsolete Jules workflows

findings.title: 28 test files but 7 test collection errors
findings.remediation: Fix broken imports in test files

findings.title: Ruff suppresses PLR0915 and C901 for control algorithms
findings.evidence: pyproject.toml ruff config with documented but risky suppressions
findings.remediation: Add complexity regression tests; require ADR for new suppressions

findings.title: Missing CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md
findings.remediation: Add standard governance files

findings.title: CI mixed — recent main push failures
findings.evidence: Recent main branch CI failures observed
findings.remediation: Stabilize CI before merging main branch

findings.title: Dirty working tree with untracked rust_core/ and vendor/
findings.evidence: git status shows untracked rust_core/ and vendor/ directories
findings.remediation: Complete cleanup; commit or .gitignore untracked directories

findings.title: Only 9 test files for 264K LOC repo — ratio ~0.06
findings.remediation: Add unit tests for thermo_database.py, gasification_enthalpy.py, GUI modules

findings.title: CI failures on dirty tree
findings.evidence: CI fails because working tree is not clean
findings.remediation: Clean tree; add git status --porcelain check to CI

findings.title: Untracked .claude/worktrees/ directory
findings.remediation: Add .claude/ to .gitignore or commit worktrees config if intentional

findings.title: Test coverage low for 580K LOC repo
findings.evidence: Few test files relative to massive codebase
findings.remediation: Prioritize tests for most-changed modules in last 6 months

findings.title: preconditions.py duplicated across MuJoCo_Models and Pinocchio_Models
findings.remediation: Extract shared contracts package (see fleet theme 2)

findings.title: CI pass rate 65% (13/20)
findings.remediation: Triage failures; likely Xvfb or display-related

findings.title: Shared contracts duplication (see fleet theme 2)
findings.remediation: Extract shared robotics-contracts package

findings.title: CI pass rate 70% (14/20) with 4 failures, 2 cancelled
findings.remediation: Stabilize display/headless tests

findings.title: Shared contracts duplication (see fleet theme 2)
findings.remediation: Extract shared robotics-contracts package

findings.title: No performance benchmarks for trajectory optimization
findings.evidence: No pytest-benchmark or criterion benchmarks in tests/
findings.remediation: Add pytest-benchmark for hot paths

findings.title: preconditions.py duplication (see fleet theme 2)
findings.evidence: Duplicated verbatim across three robotics repos
findings.remediation: Extract shared robotics-contracts package

findings.title: geometry.py.orig stale file from merge conflict
findings.remediation: Delete .orig files; add *.orig to .gitignore

findings.title: CI Standard frequent failures; Local-Only Guard mostly success — test isolation issues
findings.remediation: Merge CI tiers or fix isolation issues in CI Standard

findings.title: Missing SECURITY.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG
findings.remediation: Add standard governance files

findings.title: pyproject.toml has empty dependencies but requirements.txt has 17 lines
findings.remediation: Consolidate deps into pyproject.toml; delete requirements.txt or make it a lockfile

fleet_themes.description: Consolidate Jules workflows, add display-headless guards, pin action versions, introduce 10-minute job timeout
Extract contracts into lightweight D-sorganization/robotics-contracts package
Create SECURITY.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md in all repos missing them
Bring test-to-source ratios to target (0.50 for apps, 0.80 for services)
Clean untracked files or add to .gitignore; add git status check to CI
